Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha. CSR: Susan Lee, CSR #4280.

Minh Nguyen, Esq. for and with Petitioner: Karey Stoeck, present as Guardian ad litem for and the Minors: Isaac Fabela, Elijah Carroll and Marcus Carroll, was sworn and direct examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petitions are granted and compromises are approved as follows:
as to minor Isaac Fabela net balance is $9,187.50
as to minor Marcus Carroll and Elijah Carroll net balance is $4,593.75 each.
Each net balance to be used for purchase of an ANNUITY as described in the Attachment 19(b)3 of each Petition.
Orders Approving Compromise of Claim signed in open court.
